title: iRoasted Wholesome Squash Tagine
description: An earthy and shaggy weeknight polish dish featuring a mix of whole30-friendly ingredients cooked in a cataplana.
instructions: Halve the butternut squash lengthwise and scoop out the seeds.
Slice the onion into thin rings and chop the garlic cloves finely.
In a cataplana, toss together the halved squash, onion slices, garlic, bay leaves, raisins, icing sugar, paprika, and cumin seeds.
Drizzle with 1 tablespoon of water. Place in the oven and roast for 30 minutes.
After 25 minutes, mix the squash mixture gently to redistribute the flavors evenly across all parts of the cataplana.
Let it continue to cook until all liquid is absorbed and the squash is tender, about another 5 minutes.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
